description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image and set GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository's .gradle directory via a before_script. Define a GRADLE_OPTS variable with -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Add a build job in the build stage that uses a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME storing the build and .gradle directories (policy push) and runs the command gradle compileJava. Add a test job in the test stage that pulls the same cache (policy pull) and runs gradle test. No artifacts, services, or branch/tag rules are required.
